svg.title: French Energy Intelligence Platform — full data architecture
svg.desc: Data flows from RTE API and Open-Meteo through Kafka into MinIO bronze, PySpark transforms to Delta Lake silver, dbt and DuckDB build the gold layer, FastAPI serves ML predictions with MLflow, Streamlit presents the dashboard.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the RTE API work and what data does it provide?')
sendPrompt('How does the Open-Meteo API work and how is it different from RTE?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the rte.generation Kafka topic — what messages does it carry?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the rte.consumption Kafka topic')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the weather.paris Kafka topic and how it is consumed')
sendPrompt('Explain the bronze layer and medallion architecture — why is raw data stored unchanged?')
g.text: Raw JSON · Hive partitions · live (Kafka) + historical (éCO2mix direct load)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about bronze_to_silver_generation.py — what transformations does it apply?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about bronze_to_silver_weather.py — how does it resample hourly data to 30-minute intervals?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about silver_join.py — how does it join generation and weather on timestamp?')
sendPrompt('What is Delta Lake and why does the silver layer use it instead of plain Parquet?')
g.text: 54,090 rows · typed · ACID · time travel · energy_with_weather

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the four dbt gold models and what does each one compute?')
sendPrompt('Why was DuckDB chosen over a full database like Postgres for the gold layer?')
sendPrompt('Explain the four gold layer models: hourly_energy_mix, daily_consumption_summary, co2_intensity, regional_weekly')
g.text: hourly mix · daily consumption · CO₂ intensity · regional weekly

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does MLflow experiment tracking work and how is the champion model registered?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI prediction endpoint work and what does /predict return?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the four Streamlit dashboard pages and what each one shows')
g.text: live energy mix · France map · consumption forecast · pipeline health
